name: finance
description: Research-grade quantitative finance. PhD-level mathematical toolkit covering stochastic calculus (Brownian motion, Itô, GBM, OU), derivative pricing (Black-Scholes PDE + Greeks, Heston with characteristic-function pricing, Merton jump-diffusion, American options via CRR / Longstaff-Schwartz), risk metrics (VaR, CVaR, Sharpe / Sortino / Calmar / Ulcer), portfolio theory (Markowitz, Kelly, CAPM, Fama-French, APT), term structure (Vasicek / CIR / Nelson-Siegel), numerical methods (Monte Carlo with variance reduction, finite-difference PDE), and backtesting methodology. Companion files QUANT.md and MODELS.md, grounded against Hull / Bjork / Wilmott / Glasserman. Analysis-only; pair with @trader for execution.
